goal: Build a sphere-pick station: 4 spheres (5cm diameter) on conveyor → bin. Tests gripper grip on round objects (no flat faces). Industrial use: ball-bearing palletizing, fruit handling.
thoughts:
Six sphere-pick specifics for CP-43 (extends CP-01 — sphere geometry instead of cube):
1) 4 Sphere primitives at radius=0.025m (5cm diameter). Default Sphere primitive radius=1; scale uniformly to 0.025/1=0.025.
2) Spheres on belt — they roll naturally with belt friction, more momentum than cubes.
3) Gripper grips at sphere widest point — fingers slide if friction insufficient. Rubber material critical.
4) cuRobo's plan_pose uses bbox center — sphere bbox = AABB enclosing sphere → center = sphere center. Same as cube.
5) Sphere settling: spheres roll until friction stops them. sleepThreshold=0 keeps physics ticking during slow rolling.
6) Industrial use: fruit packing, ball bearings, round-part transport.
code:
# DomeLight + Ground + Cell + Table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[0.0, 0.4, 0.78],
    size=[3.0, 0.4, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.2, 0, 0],
)

# 4 spheres 5cm diameter
for i, x in enumerate([-1.4, -1.15, -0.9, -0.65]):
    path = f"/World/Sphere_{i+1}"
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Sphere", position=[x, 0.4, 0.835], radius=0.025)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[f"/World/Sphere_{i+1}" for i in range(4)],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
for path in [f"/World/Sphere_{i+1}" for i in range(4)]:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

create_bin(prim_path="/World/Bin", position=[0, -0.4, 0.75], size=[0.3, 0.3, 0.15])

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.4, 0.4, 0.835], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    source_paths=[f"/World/Sphere_{i+1}" for i in range(4)],
    destination_path="/World/Bin",
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt", "/World/Bin"],
)
extension_notes: CP-43 tests handler with sphere geometry. Spheres roll on belt — different physics from cube. Gripper grips at widest point (equator); friction-only grip is fragile for round objects. Industrial use: ball-bearing handling.
failure_modes: Spheres roll off conveyor sides if belt edges sharp. Conveyor 0.4m wide gives 17.5cm side margin — adequate.
Gripper friction-grip on sphere fragile — rubber material critical. May slip during transport.
cuRobo plan uses bbox center — sphere AABB center matches sphere center. Plan unchanged from cube.
verified_status: build-spec-2026-04-XX; form-gate ✓; function-gate ✓ (belt-pause pre-step subscribe (Sphere_1 delivered))
